headline: Discontinued Pepsi soda brand quietly returns to stores
summary: When a manufacturer discontinues a product, it knows it's running the risk of alienating some customers. When Coca-Cola killed TaB, its first diet cola, the chain angered a dedicated fanbase that has protested the loss since. "Coca-Cola’s first diet cola. Discontinued in 2020 after 57 years, but ...

headline: The Crowd Is Selling Coca-Cola. Here's Why I'd Be Buying the Dip.
summary: Coca-Cola stock has dropped about 5% over the past week.
